title: We Didn't Start the Fire
why_this_song: We Didn't Start the Fire by Billy Joel (1989) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "didn't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "didn't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "start" in the whole song?

Hula hoops, Castro, Edsel is a no-go

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "We Didn't Start the Fire" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "We Didn't Start the Fire" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "We Didn't Start the Fire" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "We Didn't Start the Fire" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "We Didn't Start the Fire" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "We Didn't Start the Fire"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
